items.title: Microsoft 365 Copilot usage report (per-app breakout)
items.description: Admin report showing total enabled and active users, Copilot usage broken out per Microsoft 365 app, and anonymized user-level activity insights.

items.title: Copilot Cowork — agentic task execution
items.description: Agentic system that plans, executes, and delivers completed work grounded in Work IQ. Enabled via usage-based billing with a Cost Management Dashboard in the admin center.

items.title: Copilot in Excel with Python
items.description: Copilot applies Python-powered techniques while editing Excel — transforming data, generating visualizations, and completing multi-step analysis without leaving the workbook.

items.title: Remote MCP servers via Work IQ endpoint
items.description: Supports connecting to remote MCP servers through the Work IQ endpoint, enabling agents to securely invoke external tools and services beyond the local runtime.

items.title: Copilot memory in Word
items.description: Copilot personalizes responses based on relevant user context and prior interactions, reducing the need to restate preferences or background.

items.title: Copilot vision — show-and-ask in voice conversations
items.description: Users show a dashboard, document, image, or real-world object to Copilot and ask questions in a voice conversation; Copilot uses that visual context to explain and guide next steps.

news.title: What’s New in Microsoft 365 Copilot | June 2026
What’s New in Microsoft 365 Copilot | May 2026
